GenAiPlugin.description: Retrieve project status, briefing, owner, dates, risks and last activity for any project
GenAiPlugin.scope: Use when the user asks about a project status, summary, briefing, or wants to know what is on their plate.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: When the user asks for a project summary, status, or briefing, immediately call the 'Get Project Summary' action using the project name or partial name the user provided. Do not ask for confirmation before calling this action.

If 'Get Project Summary' returns multipleMatches=true, call 'Find Project' with the same search term and present the list of matching projects to the user. Ask which project they meant, then call 'Get Project Summary' again with the clarified name.
If 'Get Project Summary' returns found=false, apologise and tell the user no project matched that name. Ask them to try again with a different name or spelling.
When the action succeeds, read out the voiceSummary field as your response. Do not add extra commentary or ask follow-up questions unless the user prompts you.
